channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large pothole on side of road, 7th May
item.description:
Another large pothole at the top of the hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on hill above Ethridges house, 7th May
item.description:
Severe degradation to a section of road going up the hill from Ethridges house.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 7th May
item.description:
Depression CW 700x700x40mm approx Road closure Marked not measured. X 1 NSD (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road is chewed up, 4 potholes at least, 7th May
item.description:
Halfway in between Little Colesbourne House and Staple Farm, in a dip hard to miss
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many very bad potholes covering a mini roundabout by the Community Centre. It causes huge damage to cars and bikes, where the bump has been repaired incredibly badly previously, and needs to be completely resurfaced., 7th May
item.description:
Covering the entire mini roundabout by the Community Centre in Churchdown, Parton Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 7th May
item.description:
Abrupt level differences FW Patch required 3000x1000x20mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th May
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 400x400x45mm approx Road closure with 15db Stats (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th May
item.description:
Pothole CW 400x400x50mm approx Stop and go (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 7th May
item.description:
Abrupt level differences FW Patch required 2000x1000x20mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several very bad potholes covering a speedbump at the end of Oldbury Orchard, turning left onto Brookfield Road. It causes huge damage to cars and bikes, where the bump has been repaired incredibly badly previously, and needs to be completely resurfaced., 7th May
item.description:
Several very bad potholes covering a speedbump at the end of Oldbury Orchard, turning left onto Brookfield Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 7th May
item.description:
15DB 28DAY CW Pothole Approx 600x600x43mm Temporary Road Closure TM 5xNSD'S (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 7th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 7th May
item.description:
Damaged sign post Please reinstate damaged sign post Standard TM (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 7th May
item.description:
ENWD Damaged sign post Please remove damaged signpost , correct signs and fill holes Standard TM (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th May
item.description:
Pothole CW 800x300x70mm approx Road closure Stats Not able to mark or measure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can't see priority sign due to vegetation, 7th May
item.description:
///asleep.items.assume The priority sign is not visible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign structurally damaged/leaning more than 20 degrees/loose in ground (Non illuminating sign)
